calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction To Remove Vicious Dog From 2465 Filbert Street
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Catterall, 415.956.8100 of Zacks, Freedman & Patterson, P.C. appearing for Plaintiff David Andrighetto.
Benjamin Vivo-Watcher, No number provided, Defendant appearing on his own behalf.

Discussed. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF DAVID ANDRIGHETTO, VICKI SVENDSGAARD Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction To Remove Vicious Dog From 2465 Filbert Street is withdrwan per request of the moving party. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion For Preliminary Injunction To Remove Vicious Dog From 2465 Filbert Street
Off Calendar Feb-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION TO REMOVE VICIOUS DOG FROM 2465 FILBERT STREET is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion served by overnight mail on February 3, 2023.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
